prompt: Professional medical illustration: Futuristic digital brain cross-section (axial view) showing subarachnoid hemorrhage as a RED FIVE-POINTED STAR blood pattern at the base of the brain (representing blood in the 5 cisternal spaces: interhemispheric, bilateral sylvian, suprasellar, and perimesencephalic). Above the brain, display THREE wireframe cubes with labels: LEFT '8.2 mL' (small cube), MIDDLE '2.5 mL' (tiny cube), RIGHT '16.7 mL' (large cube, TWICE the width/height of the 8.2 mL cube). Modern CT scanner on the left side. Global network connections radiating to hospital icons across continents. Title 'SUBARACHNOID HEMORRHAGE BLOOD VOLUME' centered at top. Deep blue medical aesthetic, white text, red star-shaped blood. NO commas, NO decimals with commas, only periods for decimals. Scientific, clean, high-end medical journal style.
